about: Propose improvements to README, inline code comments, or code formatting.

### Type of Improvement
<!-- Select all that apply -->
- [ ] README or external documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring / clearing technical debt
- [ ] Adding inline code comments or docstrings for data/rag_api/clustering modules
- [ ] Fixing broken environment setup steps, missing dependencies, or prerequisites

### Describe the Area of Improvement
<!-- Which files or folders need work? -->
A clear description of what section of the codebase needs cleaning up or documenting (e.g., `rag_api/`, `clustering/`, `app.py`, `database.py`, `requirements.txt`, etc.).

### Why this is helpful
<!-- Do not exaggerate, use simple language -->
Explain how this will help future GSSoC contributors or make the BizInsight-AI customer analytics pipeline easier to understand and maintain.
